title: Accessibility feedback form - Canada.ca
content:
## Accessibility feedback form
Provide feedback on the Environment and Climate Change Canada (ECCC) accessibility plan, barriers you have experienced, or any matter related to accessibility.
You can consult the Accessibility feedback process for other ways to provide feedback and how we use your feedback.
The collection of personal information is authorized by section 7(1)(a) and Section 70 of the Accessible Canada Act . This personal information is collected by the Accessibility Secretariat to comply with the Accessible Canada Act by creating a mechanism to collect feedback and be able to respond back to the individual and acknowledge office or that their feedback has been collected and how it was handled.
Collection and use of this personal information is in accordance with the Privacy Act . The mechanism is used to collect feedback internally and externally on our Accessibility Plan, future progress reports, as well as accessibility and barriers to accessibility within the work carried out in each department.
The personal information collected is described in Personal Information Bank PSU 938 – Outreach Activities and will be retained for 7 years. Under the Privacy Act you have the right of access to, and correction of, your personal information. To exercise either of these rights, contact ECCC’s ATIP Coordinator. If you are not satisfied with Environment and Climate Change Canada’s response to your privacy concern, you may wish to Contact the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
